tasks.title: Fix build failure in @repo/config (GAP-016)
tasks.description:
Replace `error.errors` with `error.issues` in `packages/config/src/env.ts:207` and type the `err` parameter properly. Line 25 of same file uses `.issues` correctly - follow that pattern. This is a P0 blocker that breaks typecheck for the entire monorepo.

tasks.title: Create StrongPasswordSchema base schema (GAP-014/019)
tasks.description:
Create a single source of truth for password validation:
1. Create `packages/schemas/src/common/password.schema.ts`
2. Define `StrongPasswordSchema` with: `.min(8).max(128).regex(/^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)(?=.*[@$!%*?&])/)`
3. Export from `packages/schemas/src/common/index.ts`
4. Export from main schemas package index

Test: Add unit tests for StrongPasswordSchema: accepts strong passwords, rejects weak ones (no uppercase, no digit, no special char, too short, too long). File: `packages/schemas/test/common/password.schema.test.ts`

tasks.title: Add lockout to forgot-password endpoint (GAP-002)
tasks.description:
Extend lockout protection to `/forgot-password` in `apps/api/src/routes/auth/handler.ts`:
1. Add handler BEFORE Better Auth catch-all (like sign-in handler at line 32)
2. Extract email from request body
3. Use composite key `forgot-password:${email}:${ip}` for rate limiting
4. Limit: 5 attempts per 15 minutes per email
5. Return 429 with Retry-After on limit exceeded

4. Import Sentry from existing `apps/api/src/lib/sentry.ts`

tasks.title: Create generic audit middleware for mutations (GAP-017)
tasks.description:
Create Hono middleware that automatically audit-logs ALL mutation requests:
1. Create `apps/api/src/middlewares/audit.ts`
2. Check `c.req.method` - skip GET/HEAD/OPTIONS
3. For mutations: call `await next()`, then if `c.res.status < 400`, log RESOURCE_MUTATION
4. Extract: actorId from `c.get('user')`, resource from path, method from HTTP method
5. Add `RESOURCE_MUTATION` to AuditEventType
6. MUST be 100% fail-safe: entire middleware wrapped in try-catch
7. Register in `apps/api/src/utils/create-app.ts` AFTER actorMiddleware()

Files: `apps/api/src/middlewares/audit.ts` (new), `apps/api/src/utils/create-app.ts`
Test: Unit tests for middleware: logs on POST 200, skips GET, skips on 4xx, does not throw on logger failure.

subtasks.title: Implement afterResponse logging for successful mutations

tasks.title: Add integration tests for audit middleware (GAP-017)
tasks.description:
Comprehensive tests for the generic audit middleware:
1. POST request returns 200 -> audit log emitted with correct resource/actor/method
2. GET request -> no audit log
3. POST request returns 400 -> no audit log (failed mutation)
4. Middleware failure -> request still succeeds (fail-safe)
5. Admin tier mutations are logged
6. Protected tier mutations are logged
7. Billing mutations are logged

Files: `apps/api/test/middlewares/audit.test.ts` (new)
Pattern: AAA with Hono test helpers

subtasks.title: Test fail-safe: middleware error does not break request

tasks.title: Replace read-then-write with Redis INCR in lockout store (GAP-003)
tasks.description:
Make lockout counter atomic in `apps/api/src/middlewares/auth-lockout.ts:237-255`:
1. For Redis store: replace GET+increment+SET with Redis INCR (atomic)
2. Handle firstAttempt timestamp: use separate Redis key or MULTI/EXEC
3. Set TTL on INCR key to match windowMs
4. For in-memory store: keep as-is (single-thread, no race condition)
5. Update resetAttempts to use DEL instead of SET

Files: `apps/api/src/middlewares/auth-lockout.ts`

subtasks.title: Implement Redis INCR for counter increment
